overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing a traditional Japanese temple complex nestled between a rocky hillside and a futuristic neon-lit cityscape. The camera smoothly orbits the temple during golden hour, revealing the stark contrast between ancient wooden architecture and modern skyscrapers with holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: smoothly circling the temple complex from an aerial perspective, passing a tall white communication tower

entered.detail: tall white metal lattice tower with satellite dishes and ladder rungs
traditional Japanese wooden temple with grey tiled roofs, white walls, and red accents
reddish-brown rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation rising behind the temple
futuristic high-rise buildings visible in the distant background
lush green deciduous trees surrounding the temple grounds

segments.scene_description: The drone camera begins its orbit of a traditional Japanese temple complex, passing closely by a tall white communication tower on the left. The temple's grey tiled roofs and white walls are bathed in warm golden hour light, set against a rocky hillside backdrop with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple complex with emerging cyberpunk city view

events.description: large purple neon holographic advertisement enters view on the right as the camera clears the communication tower

agents.ego_description: continuing to circle the temple, revealing the red torii gate and the neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: traditional red Japanese gate structure with black roof at the temple entrance
large purple holographic advertisement glowing on the side of a skyscraper
green holographic signage depicting a human figure on a distant building

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its clockwise orbit, the communication tower passes out of view and a vibrant red torii gate becomes visible at the temple entrance. The futuristic cityscape emerges on the right with large purple and green holographic advertisements appearing on the skyscrapers, contrasting sharply with the traditional architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple complex against neon cityscape backdrop

events.description: camera reveals full scale of futuristic skyscrapers with prominent neon advertisements dominating the right side

agents.ego_description: completing the orbit around the temple, showcasing the full cyberpunk city backdrop

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its circuit around the temple, with the red torii gate now behind the view. The futuristic cityscape dominates the right side with massive neon holograms and skyscrapers filling the frame, creating a dramatic juxtaposition between the ancient temple architecture and the cyberpunk metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous clockwise orbit around a traditional Japanese temple that gradually reveals a sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by gliding past a tall white communication tower, capturing the temple's grey tiled roofs and white walls bathed in the warm glow of golden hour against a rocky hillside. As the camera continues its rotation, the tower recedes to make way for a vibrant red torii gate at the temple entrance, while the distant skyline begins to sharpen into a dense cityscape. The scene then expands to reveal massive purple and green holographic advertisements flickering on the skyscrapers to the right, creating a stark contrast with the ancient wooden architecture. Finally, the camera completes its circuit, leaving the torii gate behind as the frame becomes dominated by the towering neon holograms and futuristic scale of the surrounding metropolis.
